programme.title: Diverse, Beautiful Music by Qwest TV
programme.desc: Qwest TV breaks down the barriers between the worldâ€™s best, diverse sounds that will move you!

programme.title: Where Great Music Meets by Qwest TV
programme.desc: A curated selection of concerts from all around the globe that pushes boundaries and soothes your soul!

programme.title: From Be Bop to Hip Hop by Qwest TV
programme.desc: Discover new tracks and timeless standards: "From Bebop to Doo-Wop to Hip Hop" as Quincy Jones loves to say!

programme.title: Itâ€™s Showtime! by Qwest TV
programme.desc: This is your front-row seat for tonight's concert on Qwest TV!

programme.title: Sullivan Fortner - Live in Paris
programme.desc: Pianist Sullivan Fortner delivers an exciting solo set in the context of his double-album 'Solo Game'.

programme.title: Sullivan Fortner - Live in Paris
programme.desc: Pianist Sullivan Fortner delivers an exciting solo set in the context of his double-album 'Solo Game'.

NiconÃ© | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Alexander Gerlach aka NiconÃ© has become synonymous with a certain playful touch and light-hearted attitude that flows through his music and goes hand in hand with a laidback natural tenor. Here as a pÃ¥art of the Berlin Boat event as a part of Ritter Butzke on Tour in Germany's capital.

programme.title: Danny Avila | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Danny Avila live from UNTOLD Festival 2021. The Spanish DJ and producer amazed the crowd with his magical Techno show on the mainstage.

programme.title: Marco Carola | Time Warp | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Marco Carola takes control of the main room at Time Warp Holland and proceeds to blow down the house with a stunning set of Tech House & techno gems.

programme.title: Claptone | Pacha On Air - Bavarian State Opera | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Imagine youÂ´re taking a walk on a quiet Saturday evening in late Munich Summer, enjoying the peace and beauty of your city. And suddenly Claptone appears.

programme.title: Pacho & Pepo | Lost in Hills 2024 | Plovdiv (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Pacho & Pepo take center stage at Lost in Hills 2024 in Plovdiv, Bulgaria, delivering a pulse-pounding set that merges raw underground energy with the natural beauty of the landscape. Perched atop one of Plovdivâ€™s historic hills, their performance channels deep techno rhythms into an open-air atmosphere charged with intensity and connection.

programme.title: Away To: Rüdersdorf with Seth Schwarz - By Late Knights & Creative State | Germany
programme.desc: Seth Schwarz brings in sweet melodies over hard hitting beats as he blends his violin performance into his one-hour set in Rüdersdorf on the outskirts of Berlin.

programme.title: Various Artists | Ultra Music Festival 2019 | Miami (USA)
programme.desc: Feel the heat of Miami and the energy of Ultra 2019. Big drops, festival anthems, and moments that defined an unforgettable year at Ultra Music Festival Miami.

programme.title: Joe T Vannelli | Villa Emo Vedelago | Treviso (Italy)
programme.desc: Joe T Vannelli live on tour with his great mix of house and melodic grooves at Villa Emo Vedelago in Treviso, Italy,

programme.title: Bonstatin Kald | Freunde Legen Auf | Cologne (Germany)
programme.desc: Bonsti is one of Freunde Legen Aufs biggest enthusiasts when it comes to digging and finding the best, most unknown stuff out there.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets at Fort Manoel | Malta
programme.desc: Tenishia delivers an unforgettable set at Chasing Sunsets from the breathtaking Fort Manoel in Malta, blending cinematic melodies and progressive beats with sweeping views of the Mediterranean. This stunning performance captures both the beauty of the location and the emotional depth of Tenishiaâ€™s sound, creating a perfect harmony between music and landscape.

programme.title: Apollonia | Music On Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a rhythmic odyssey with Apollonia at Music On Festival 2023 in the vibrant city of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Tujamo | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Tujamo playing his magic on the mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2021, The World Capital of Night and Magic, in Cluj-Napoca, Transylvania, Romania.

programme.title: Mercer | Hydeout: The Prelude | Netherlands
programme.desc: Mercer turns up the funk at Hydeout: The Prelude, delivering a high-voltage set straight from the Netherlands. Blending French house flair with disco-infused grooves and festival-ready drops, this performance is a vibrant ride through Mercer's signature soundâ€”full of rhythm, soul, and undeniable dancefloor energy.

programme.title: Andrea Oliva b2b Davide Squillace | Extrema Outdoor | Netherlands
programme.desc: Enjoy ANTS taking over Extrema Outdoor NL 2017 with an explosive b2b performance of Andrea Oliva and Davide Squillace made of powerful tech house topped with catchy vocals.

programme.title: Timmy Trumpet | UNTOLD Festival 2024 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Timmy Trumpet unleashed his trademark fusion of electronic mayhem and live trumpet flair at UNTOLD Festival 2024 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. With explosive drops, sky-high energy, and a crowd roaring from start to finish, this performance was a nonstop adrenaline rushâ€”one of the most unforgettable moments on the UNTOLD mainstage.

programme.title: Robert Babicz | Chasing Sunsets at Popeye Village | Malta
programme.desc: Robert Babicz brought his signature blend of deep, emotive electronic music to Chasing Sunsets at Popeye Village in Malta.

programme.title: Mo Ses | Quarantine Sunrise Set | Tel Aviv (Israel)
programme.desc: The Tripping proudly present Mo Ses: Quarantine Sunrise set from the city of Tel Aviv! An hour of body moving, mind expanding music from his roof to the depths of your soul, easing you out of quarantine mode and back to life. Perfect for dancing at home, in your living room or in the bedroom.

programme.title: Third Culture | HB Social Club | Oahu (Hawaii)
programme.desc: Experience the dynamic sounds of Third Culture at HB Social Club in Oahu, Hawaii.

programme.title: Will Johnston | Music That Moves Me #3 | USA
programme.desc: Will drops the third installment of his video mix series "Music That Moves Me" with a sultry set of deep house burners recorded for One House Collective's Valentine's Day 2021 stream marathon.

programme.title: Metodi Hristov | Green Love Festival 2020 | Novi Sad (Serbia)
programme.desc: Metodi Hristov getting on the Green Love Festival 2020 stage for a powerful techno set!

programme.title: Matchy | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Enjoy the progressive sounds of Matchy who takes us on an excursion through the Sauna Floor of Club Ritter Butzke.

programme.title: Matchy | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Enjoy the progressive sounds of Matchy who takes us on an excursion through the Sauna Floor of Club Ritter Butzke.

programme.title: Matchy | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Enjoy the progressive sounds of Matchy who takes us on an excursion through the Sauna Floor of Club Ritter Butzke.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets | Xlendi Tower (Malta)
programme.desc: This time the Chasing Sunsets adventures will take you to the island of Gozo... Right on the beautiful shores of Xlendi and beneath a 400 Year old guard tower.

programme.title: Morten | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Morten playing on Mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Undermoon | Radio Intense | Wroclaw (Poland)
programme.desc: Join us for a mesmerizing live set by Undermoon at the Museum of Architecture in Wroclaw, Poland.

programme.title: Hot Since 82 | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the hypnotic beats of Hot Since 82 at Music On Festival 2023 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Richie Hawtin | Cocoon at Amnesia | Ibiza
programme.desc: Richie took us on a musical journey through techno, minimal, and tech house sounds at Cocoon in Amnesia Ibiza. This night was a special edition of Cocoon, presenting the artists of Minus Recordings.

programme.title: Steve Lawler | Space Closing | Ibiza
programme.desc: Repeated torrential downbursts of rain do nothing to dampen the energy in the outside 'flight area' of the Space & We Love closing fiesta in Ibiza. Get ready for an epic ending of another great Ibiza season, with Steve Lawler in control!

programme.title: Playstream invites: Sebzz | Ardi Dahshur | Egypt
programme.desc: Travel to the beautiful Ardi - a retreat center in Dahshur nestled in palm trees.

programme.title: Hardwell | World's Biggest Guestlist Festival 2017 | India
programme.desc: Hardwell lit up Mumbai with a history-making performance at the World's Biggest Guestlist Festival 2017, uniting thousands of fans under one massive cause. With heart-pounding drops and an electrifying atmosphere, this iconic set wasnâ€™t just about the musicâ€”it was a moment of unity, energy, and purpose on a global scale.

programme.title: Solomun | Diynamic Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Diynamic boss Solomun lays down simmering slices of tough yet polished deep and tech house. It's refreshing and exciting to see him exploring new and exciting areas, with a receptive and adoring legion of fans in front of him, willing to go on that journey.

programme.title: Away To: Faqra with Lehar - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: A name we know all too well, Lehar headlines our Away To Faqra.

programme.title: Carl Cox | Extrema Outdoor | Netherlands
programme.desc: The term â€œlegendâ€ gets thrown about an awful lot these days. Often mistakenly, and loosely, used to measure how good a Dj is, this overuse has seen it's original meaning somewhat watered down. But for one spirited DJ from London, it's never been about a hunger for status; it's about enjoying the work you do, sharing the success and paving the way for the future.

programme.title: Tujamo | UNTOLD Festival 2021 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Tujamo playing his magic on the mainstage at UNTOLD Festival 2021, The World Capital of Night and Magic, in Cluj-Napoca, Transylvania, Romania.

programme.title: WhoMadeWho | Nim Sound TV | Relevance Festival | Denmark
programme.desc: Nim Sound TV brings us the stellar performance by WhoMadeWho as they rocked the dance floor of Relevance Festival in Copenhagen.

programme.title: Sven Vath | Cocoon at ADE | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: The super suave master of ceremonies himself SVEN VATH lays down some serious thump through old school vinyl and technics at Cocoon during the Amsterdam Dance Event. Soon after taking control he proceeds to smash the place to bits.

programme.title: Sunnery James & Ryan Marciano | Sensation Monument of Light | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Get ready for an electrifying experience with Sunnery James & Ryan Marciano at Sensation: Monument of Light in Amsterdam!

programme.title: Mahony | UNTOLD Festival 2023 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Dive into the beats with Mahony at UNTOLD Festival 2023 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. Experience the magic of music in the heart of Romania. Don't miss out on this unforgettable moment!

programme.title: S3A | Wonderland 2024 | Paris (France)
programme.desc: Experience the dynamic sounds of S3A at Wonderland 2024 in Paris, France.

programme.title: Novaj | Rex Club | Paris (France)
programme.desc: Join Novaj for an unforgettable night at Rex Club in Paris, France.

programme.title: Stephen Popov | Solar Summer Festival 2021 | Bourgas (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Enjoy Stephen Popov's blend of house and techno from Solar Summer festival, where he played alongside Hot Since 82 and Michael Bibi.

programme.title: Stephen Popov | Solar Summer Festival 2021 | Bourgas (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Enjoy Stephen Popov's blend of house and techno from Solar Summer festival, where he played alongside Hot Since 82 and Michael Bibi.

programme.title: Stephen Popov | Solar Summer Festival 2021 | Bourgas (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Enjoy Stephen Popov's blend of house and techno from Solar Summer festival, where he played alongside Hot Since 82 and Michael Bibi.

programme.title: Ricardo Villalobos | Sunwaves | Mamaia (Romania)
programme.desc: Ricardo Villalobos will take you on a unique journey with his performance at the Sunwaves festival in Mamaia (Romania). He starts off slow and ingeniously builds and builds his set to end in a massive explosion of party-madness.

programme.title: Away to: Byblos with Colyn - By Late Knights & Creative State | Beirut (Lebanon)
programme.desc: From the heart of one of the most iconic cities in the world, rising superstar Colyn draws inspiration from the magnificent history to play one of his best sets to date.

programme.title: Mathame | UNTOLD Festival 2022 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Mathame playing on Galaxy stage at UNTOLD Festival 2022 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania.

programme.title: Steve Bug | ZooAtHome S8E3 | The Zoo Project | Ibiza
programme.desc: Steve Bug of Poker Flat recordings takes us on an underground safari at the Zoo Project Ibiza

programme.title: Herr Krank | Wonderland 2024 | Paris (France)
programme.desc: At this iconic open-air club in Paris, France, Herr Krankâ€™s beats will resonate with the cityâ€™s vibrant spirit, promising an unforgettable musical experience.

programme.title: Afrojack | Ultra Music Festival 2017 | Miami (USA)
programme.desc: Relive the electrifying performance of Afrojack at Ultra Music Festival 2017 in Miami, USA.

programme.title: Sven Vath | Cocoon at ADE | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: The super suave master of ceremonies himself SVEN VATH lays down some serious thump through old school vinyl and technics at Cocoon during the Amsterdam Dance Event. Soon after taking control he proceeds to smash the place to bits.

programme.title: Sandrien | 909 Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Prepare for a sonic journey with Sandrien at 909 Festival 2023 in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Patrice Baumel | Audio Obscura x Revere Series | Rotterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Electronica maestro Patrice BÃ¤umel performing a stellar sunset stream from Rotterdam's Euromast

programme.title: Colyn | Hangar Grand Place | Brussels (Belgium)
programme.desc: Hangar went live on June 10th with Colyn from the centre of the most important tourist destination in Brussels - The Grand Place - at sunrise.

programme.title: Moonbootica | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Rocking house sounds of Moonbootica for the Pacha On Air series recorded at Pacha Munich. Enjoy!

programme.title: Don Diablo | Hydeout: The Prelude | Netherlands
programme.desc: Don Diablo takes virtual performance to the next level in Hydeout: The Prelude, straight from the Netherlands. Fusing futuristic visuals with his signature future house sound, this set delivers high-impact energy, emotional peaks, and a full-sensory experience that blurs the line between live show and digital spectacle.

programme.title: Vandal X | 767 Yoyo Palais de Tokyo | Paris (France)
programme.desc: Experience the raw energy of Vandal X at 767 Yoyo, Palais de Tokyo, Paris!

programme.title: Juliet Sikora | Laute Wiese RECD. at Schlosshotel Hugenpoet | Essen (Germany)
programme.desc: DJ set by Juliet Sikora (Kittball Records, GER) recorded in front of historic German castle Hugenpoet in Essen, Germany.

programme.title: Joris Voorn | Rejected Queensnight at Trouw | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Joris Voorn blows the house down with a truly epic set on Queensnight in Trouw Amsterdam, as club packed to the brim with happy people celebrates love for their Queen and electronic music. Beatrix and beats, so good together!

programme.title: Christian Craken | Lost In Hills | Plovdiv (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Christian Craken exclusive performance at Lost In Hills in Plovdiv, Bulgaria.

programme.title: Away To: Desert Oasis with Nina Kraviz - By Late Knights & Creative State | Dubai (UAE)
programme.desc: The legendary Nina Kraviz works her magic at a desert oasis for a wild ride in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: NiconÃ© | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air w NiconÃ©, recorded at Pacha Munich.

programme.title: Steve Angello | Alfa Future People | Russia
programme.desc: At Alfa Future People Festival, Steve Angello showcased his signature sound of progressive house beats.

programme.title: Steve Angello | Alfa Future People | Russia
programme.desc: At Alfa Future People Festival, Steve Angello showcased his signature sound of progressive house beats.

Kent Nagano conducts Tchaikovsky, Berlioz & Bizet
Chopin - Introduction & Polonaise, Op. 3
programme.desc: Italian cellist Silvia Chiesa and Italian pianist Maurizio Baglini perform FrÃ©dÃ©ric Chopinâ€™s Introduction and Polonaise brillante in C major, Op. 3. This performance was recorded at Sala Verdi of the Conservatorio Giuseppe Verdi in Milan, Italy, on November 4, 2024.

programme.title: Music of Naples
programme.desc: Throughout the centuries, the Italian city of Naples has proved to have a remarkably favorable climate for artistic innovation. The presence of the royal or vice royal courts, the practice of music in churches, fraternities, and charitable institutions, financial support from well-to-do citizens, and the popularity of song and dance in public life made for an extraordinarily diverse musical landscape.

programme.title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 3 in E-flat major, Op. 55
programme.desc: Maestro Herbert Blomstedt makes his debut with the Lucerne Festival Orchestra at 2020â€™s Lucerne Festival conducting Ludwig van Beethovenâ€™s celebrated Symphony No. 3 in E-flat major, Op. 55, â€œEroicaâ€. The sprightly Swedish conductor celebrated his 93rd birthday just one month before this performance. This remarkable performance was recorded at the Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in August 2020.

programme.title: Tchaikovsky - Symphony No. 1 in G minor, Op. 13
programme.desc: Conrad van Alphen leads Sinfonia Rotterdam in a performance of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovskyâ€™s Symphony No. 1 in G minor, Op. 13, â€˜Winter Daydreamsâ€™, recorded at De Doelen in Rotterdam, the Netherlands in September 2022. Having completed a number of shorter orchestral works, Tchaikovsky embarked on a more ambitious project in March 1866: to write his first symphony. In the summer of that year, the young composer showed his still-unfinished score to his former teachers Anton Rubinstein and Nikolai Zaremba, whose harsh criticism thoroughly disillusioned him. With significant changes, the entire symphony was first performed in 1868, but Tchaikovsky further revised the work in 1874. Not only did the composer subtitle his symphony â€˜Winter Daydreamsâ€™, he used descriptive titles for the first two of the four movements as well: â€˜Dreams of a Winter Journeyâ€™ and â€˜Land of Desolation, Land of Mistsâ€™.

programme.title: IVC 2021 - Final: Schumann, Sibelius a. o.
programme.desc: Baritone Arvid FagerfjÃ¤ll (Sweden, 1991) and pianist Hikaru Kanki (Japan, 1993) perform â€˜Lust der Sturmnachtâ€™ from Robert Schumannâ€™s Kerner-Lieder, Op. 35; â€˜Le diable dans la nuitâ€™ from HenriÃ«tte Bosmansâ€™ Dix mÃ©lodies; Franz Schubertâ€™s TotengrÃ¤bers Heimweh, D. 842; â€˜Die VÃ¶gleinâ€™ and â€˜Vor dem Schloss in den BÃ¤umen es rauschend wehtâ€™ from Aribert Reimannâ€™s NachtstÃ¼ck; â€˜Den fÃ¶rsta kyssenâ€™ (The first kiss) from Jean Sibeliusâ€™s Five songs, Op. 37; â€˜Ganymedâ€™ from Hugo Wolfâ€™s Goethe-Lieder; â€˜Marc Chagallâ€™ from Francis Poulencâ€™s Le travail du peintre, FP 161; â€˜Le loup et lâ€™agneauâ€™ from AndrÃ© Capletâ€™s Trois fables de Jean de la Fontaine; and â€˜Ballade des femmes de Parisâ€™ from Claude Debussyâ€™s Trois ballades de FranÃ§ois Villon, L. 126, during the final round of the International Vocal Competition 2021 â€“ Lied Duo. This performance was recorded at De Verkadefabriek in â€™s-Hertogenbosch, the Netherlands.

programme.title: Chopin - Piano Concertos No. 1 & No. 2
programme.desc: Antoni Wit conducts the Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra in performances of Chopin's Piano Concertos No. 1, Op. 11 and No. 2, Op. 21. Soloists are Nikolai Demidenko and Evgeny Kissin. After performing the first concerto, Demidenko encores with Chopin's Mazurka Op. 17 4. Kissin closes the concert with Chopin's Etude Op. 10 12 and the Waltz in E minor, Op. post. This concert was part of the celebration of Chopin's 200th anniversary in 2010. Chopin composed the second concerto one year before the Concerto No. 1 and completed both works at the age of 20, before leaving his home country Poland and moving to Paris.

programme.title: Mozart - The Magic Flute
programme.desc: Antonello Manacorda leads the Orchestra and Choir of Teatro La Fenice in a performance of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozartâ€™s beloved opera Die ZauberflÃ¶te (â€˜The Magic Fluteâ€™). Mozart probably started to compose his masterpiece in May 1791, less than six months before his death. The workâ€™s libretto is written by Emanuel Schikaneder. In its fairy tale-like narrative, Prince Tamino is commissioned by the Queen of the Night to rescue her daughter Pamina, who has been captured by priest Sarastro. Accompanied by bird-catcher Papageno, Tamino begins his quest. After finding Pamina in Sarastroâ€™s territory, Tamino is first subjected to a number of trials in order to prove he is worth marrying Pamina. Die ZauberflÃ¶te features wonderful arias, including the famous 'Der HÃ¶lle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen' ("Hell's vengeance boils in my heart"), a virtuoso aria for coloratura soprano sung by the Queen of the Night. Among the soloists are Goran JuriÄ‡, Antonio Poli, Ekaterina Sadovnikova, Alex Esposito, Olga Pudova, and Caterina di Tonno. This performance was recorded at Teatro La Fenice in Venice, Italy, in 2015.

programme.title: Riccardo Chailly conducts Mendelssohn
programme.desc: Riccardo Chaillyâ€™s inaugural concert as Kapellmeister of the Leipzig Gewandhaus Orchestra captures the full atmosphere of a unique musical occasion. The concert centers round composer Felix Mendelssohn, who founded the Gewandhaus Orchestra in 1743. It includes an overwhelming performance of Mendelssohnâ€™s Symphony No. 2, Lobgesang with its celebratory choral last movement, as well as the ever-popular overture A Midsummer Nightâ€™s Dream with outstanding vocal soloists including Anne Schwanewilms and Peter Seiffert. The Gewandhaus Orchestra can look back with pride at its 250-year history. It has made music history and evolved into one of the worldâ€™s best-known and most renowned orchestras.

programme.title: Vocal baroque works by Cavalli, Strozzi & Bembo
programme.desc: Argentinian conductor and harpsichordist Leonardo GarcÃ­a AlarcÃ³n leads his ensemble Cappella Mediterranea in a program of Italian Baroque music. The ensemble performs some of the finest Baroque pieces composed by Francesco Cavalli, a prominent composer in 17th-century Venice, and two of his famous students, Barbara Strozzi and Antonia Bembo. Argentinian soprano Mariana Flores presents the vocal works. On the program are â€˜Mira questi due lumiâ€™ from Cavalliâ€™s Le nozze di Teti e di Peleo, â€˜Dimmi, Amor, che farÃ²â€™ from L'Oristeo, â€˜Sinfonia della notteâ€™ from Lâ€™Egisto, and â€˜E vuol dunque Ciprignaâ€™ from Ercole Amante; â€˜Mâ€™ingannasti in veritÃ â€™ from Bemboâ€™s Produzioni armoniche consacrate a Luigi XIV; Strozziâ€™s Sino alla morte, Che si puÃ² fare, Lagrime mie, Lâ€™amante segreto, and Ã¨ Pazzo il moi core; Biagio Mariniâ€™s La Romanesca; Tarquinio Merulaâ€™s Aria Sopra La Cieccona; and Dario Castelloâ€™s Sonata Seconda. This performance was recorded at the magnificent Ã‰glise Notre-Dame of SablÃ©-sur-Sarthe, France, on August 26, 2020.

programme.title: Schubert - Overture to Rosamunde (D. 644)
programme.desc: Andreas Spering conducts Philharmonie Zuidnederland in a performance of "Overture Rosamunde" (D. 644), by Franz Schubert (1797-1828). Recorded in Muziekgebouw Eindhoven, the Netherlands in 2015. Schubert initially composed the Overture for Georg Ernst von hofmann's play 'Die Zauberharfe' ('The Magic Harp'), which premiered on August 19, 1820. Three years later, the overture was used again, this time for Helmina von ChÃ©zy's play Rosemunde. ChÃ©zy's (1783-1856) librettos enjoyed little succes, and it is said that Schubert's contribution to Rosamunde saved the production.

programme.title: Mozart - Divertimento No. 11, K. 251
programme.desc: The soloists from the Lucerne Festival Orchestra present Wolfgang Amadeus Mozartâ€™s Divertimento No. 11 in D major, K. 251, known as the â€˜Nannerl-Septetâ€™. Mozart composed it in 1776, probably on the occasion of his sister Maria Annaâ€™s name day, whose nickname was â€˜Nannerlâ€™. The septet is scored for oboe, two horns, two violins, viola and double bass. This performance was recorded at Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in 2020.

programme.title: Mozart - String Quartet No. 21
programme.desc: From the Rammenau Castle, the Gewandhaus-Quartett presents Mozart's String Quartet No. 21 in D major, K. 575. Nicknamed The Violet, this piece was composed in 1789 and is the first of the Prussian Quartets, a series of plays written for Friedrich Wilhelm II, King of Prussia and amateur cellist, in a style similar to Joseph Haydn's quartets. Founded in 1808, the Gewandhaus-Quartett is the oldest quartet in the world, continuously performing for more than 200 years. It is currently composed of Frank Michael Erben (first violin), Conrad Suske (second violin), Volker Metz (viola), JÃ¼rnjakob Timm (cello), and Steffen Adelmann (double bass).

programme.title: MartinuÌŠ - Concertino for Piano Trio and Strings
programme.desc: The Italian-Swiss ensemble Trio des Alpes, consisting of Hana KotkovÃ¡ (violin), Claude Hauri (cello), and Corrado Greco (piano), and the Orchestra da Camera di Mantova join forces in this performance of the Concertino for Piano Trio and String Orchestra, H. 232 by Czech composer Bohuslav Martin (1890-1959). Martin was a prolific composer, creating an oeuvre of almost 400 works. The four-movement Concertino was completed in 1933 and saw its first performance in 1936, by the Basler Kammerorchester under the baton of Paul Sacher. During the years 1931-1943, Martin wrote multiple concertante compositions. Many of these works were more or less influenced by the Baroque â€˜concerto grossoâ€™ form, in which a group of solo instruments is set against a large ensemble, a principle that appealed to the composer. This performance was recorded at Teatro Bibiena in Mantua, Italy, on January 21, 2016.

programme.title: Mozart Symphony No. 34 & DvoÅ™Ã¡k Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Maestro IvÃ¡n Fischer leads the Orchestra del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino in a remarkable concert program of works by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart and AntonÃ­n DvoÅ™Ã¡k. Mozartâ€™s Symphony No. 34 in C major, K. 338 opens the program. Completed in the summer of 1780, this was the last symphony Mozart wrote in Salzburg, where he worked as a court musician. The three-movement symphony features two vibrant outer movements with fanfares and rousing themes, while the quieter second movement is scored for strings alone, deviating from the typical four-movement structure of the time. Next on the program is DvoÅ™Ã¡kâ€™s Symphony No. 7 in D minor, Op. 70, completed in March 1885 and premiered one month later in London conducted by the composer himself. With its dramatic and dark style, this symphony stands in stark contrast to the predominantly optimistic tone of DvoÅ™Ã¡kâ€™s broader oeuvre. This performance was recorded at Teatro del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino in Florence, Italy, on January 29, 2021.

programme.title: Stingray Originals - Seljan Nasibli
programme.desc: Azerbaijan-born artist Seljan Nasibli moved to England at an early age, where she was encouraged to take up music. Although Nasibli chose to sing jazz, her Oxford teachers heard an operatic tendency in her voice and advised to train classically. Nasibli completed her studies at The Royal College of Music, where she graduated with a master's degree in Vocal Performance. In this episode of Stingray Originals, Nasibli performs three of Giacomo Puccini's most beautiful arias: 'Signore, ascolta!' and 'Tu, che di gel sei cinta' from the opera Turandot, and 'Quando m'en vo' (Musetta's Waltz) from the opera La bohÃ¨me.

programme.title: Pierre Boulez - A life for music
programme.desc: The French musician and composer Pierre Boulez (1925-2016) is considered one of the most influential figures in twentieth-century music. In the documentary 'Pierre Boulez â€“ A life of music' (2017), Reiner E. Moritz creates a personal portrait of the young and impatient artist who once impetuously suggested to blow up the opera houses in order to do away with stuffy traditions, yet later moved on to conduct the "Ring of the Century" in the very heart of traditional opera, Bayreuth, and became a prized guest conductor with the worldÂ´s greatest orchestras. The documentary includes fragments from the composer's rich oeuvre, and features rare photographs from the Boulez-Chevalier archive. The documentary is at its most personal when the maestro's family and friends reflect on his life. Boulez's younger brother Roger shares invaluable information about Pierre's early years, and the renowned pianist Daniel Barenboim opens up about his friendâ€™s music and compositions.

programme.title: Rachmaninoff - Piano Concerto No. 1. Op. 1
programme.desc: Piano soloist Boris Berezovsky is accompanied by the Moscow Philharmonic Orchestra under the baton of Alexander Sladkovsky in a performance of Sergei Rachmaninov's Piano Concerto no. 1, Op. 1. Rachmaninov composed his first concerto while studying at the Moscow Conservatory at the age of 18. The concert opens with 'Heavenly Movement', a composition by the young Russian composer Elmir Nizamov (*1986). This concert was recorded at the Tchaikovksy Concert Hall of the Moscow Philharmonic Society on April 28, 2017.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Mahler - Symphony No. 8
programme.desc: Mahler's Symphony No. 8, also known as the "Symphony of a Thousand," is a monumental choral epic composed in 1906 that requires an enormous ensemble of soloists, choruses, and a massive orchestra to perform its vast musical tapestry. The work is a unique and grandiose tribute to love and the spiritual salvation of mankind, drawing from two distinct textual sources to create its sublime effect. Audiences most value its overwhelming, ecstatic emotional power and the sheer spectacle of the grand performing forces.

programme.title: Beethoven - String Quartets No. 2, 14 & 16
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ã‰bÃ¨ne marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composerâ€™s sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist RaphaÃ«l Merlin immersed themselves in Beethovenâ€™s 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composerâ€™s complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ã‰bÃ¨ne explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ã‰bÃ¨ne performing Beethovenâ€™s String Quartet No. 2 in G major, Op. 18, No. 2; String Quartet No. 16 in F major, Op. 135; and String Quartet No. 14 in C-sharp minor, Op. 131. This concert was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on December 16, 2020.

programme.title: Napoli - Music's forgotten capital -I
programme.desc: In the summer of 2019, the Utrecht Early Music Festival explored the musical legacy of Naples: a cultural metropolis of contradiction and solidarity. In the documentary 'Napoli â€“ Musicâ€™s Forgotten Capital', festival co-curator Thomas HÃ¶ft unearths riveting tales from this multi-faceted city.

programme.title: Schumann - Piano Quintet in E-flat major, Op. 44
programme.desc: At the behest of Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich, several classical music stars took part in this concert in aid of the Erasmus Fund for medical research in intensive care, recorded at the Royal Conservatory of Brussels, Belgium, on October 21, 2023. The concert pays tribute to the renowned cellist Aleksandr Khramouchin (1979) who suddenly passed away on May 13, 2023. As part of this concert, pianist Martha Argerich, violinists Tedi Papavrami and Yossif Ivanov, violist Lyda Chen-Argerich, and cellist Jing Zhao perform Robert Schumannâ€™s Piano Quintet in E-flat major, Op. 44.

programme.title: Works by Bach, BartÃ³k, and Brahms
programme.desc: IvÃ¡n Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra in an exciting concert program consisting of works by J. S. Bach, BÃ©la BartÃ³k, and Johannes Brahms. The program opens with Bachâ€™s Brandenburg Concerto No. 3 in G major, BWV 1048. This is followed by one of BartÃ³kâ€™s best-known pieces: Music for strings, percussion and celesta. Remarkable is the workâ€™s instrumentation: BartÃ³k divided the strings into two groups that are placed on opposite sides of the stage, to create antiphonal effects. The program ends with Brahmsâ€™s Symphony No. 3 in F major, Op. 90. This performance was recorded at the BÃ©la BartÃ³k National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on December 4, 2017.

programme.title: Prokofiev - Peter and the Wolf
programme.desc: Leonard Bernstein, David Bowie, Bill Clinton, Mikhail Gorbachev, they have all once narrated the world-famous symphonic fairy tale 'Peter and the Wolf' (1936), composed by Sergei Prokofiev (1891-1953). In this work, every character is illustrated by a different instrument (or section), with its own musical theme. Peter, for example, is represented by the strings, his grumpy grandfather by the bassoon, the cat by the clarinet, and the bird by the flute. As the narrative progresses and the characters interact with each other, the musical themes beautifully entwine. This performance (2018) is narrated and conducted by Marin Alsop. The musical accompaniment is provided by the Britten-Pears Orchestra.

programme.title: Ice Dance: Swan Lake (2015)
programme.desc: The Imperial Ice Stars are an ensemble of 24 world class skaters, holding more than 300 competition medals between them. Praised by critics and audiences alike, they never fail to enchant with creative and powerful story-telling, sumptuous sets, spectacular special effects and opulent costumes. Set to the original score of Tchaikovsky's masterpiece, the Imperial Ice Stars present their 2015 Ice Dance interpretation of Swan Lake, complete with an exhilarating choreography from leading ice director Tony Mercer. â€œInspired by my research into Tchaikovskyâ€™s original score and intentions for the story, I wanted to create a more realistic interpretation of this much-loved tale and transpose it onto ice, creating a new art form in the process â€“ ice dance in a full theatrical setting,â€ the choreographer explains. â€œI always felt it was a natural fit, to have swans gliding on ice.â€

programme.title: Ice Dance: Swan Lake (2015)
programme.desc: The Imperial Ice Stars are an ensemble of 24 world class skaters, holding more than 300 competition medals between them. Praised by critics and audiences alike, they never fail to enchant with creative and powerful story-telling, sumptuous sets, spectacular special effects and opulent costumes. Set to the original score of Tchaikovsky's masterpiece, the Imperial Ice Stars present their 2015 Ice Dance interpretation of Swan Lake, complete with an exhilarating choreography from leading ice director Tony Mercer. â€œInspired by my research into Tchaikovskyâ€™s original score and intentions for the story, I wanted to create a more realistic interpretation of this much-loved tale and transpose it onto ice, creating a new art form in the process â€“ ice dance in a full theatrical setting,â€ the choreographer explains. â€œI always felt it was a natural fit, to have swans gliding on ice.â€
